Video.summary: Robert Goulet, Rich Little & Pat Carroll guest. Rich impresses while Robert & Pat join "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little

Image.alt: Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little

Video.summary: Jack Weston and Michele Lee join for a sketch juxtaposing couples. Also: a doctor's visit is an emotional.
Video.title: Jack Weston, Michele Lee

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters & Tim Conway star in "As The Stomach Turns" spoofing "The Exorcist" in the process.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Rock Hudson plays a man on the prowl for the ladies in a bar. Also, Tim is a television announcer.
Video.title: Rock Hudson

Video.summary: Betty White plays Eunice's sister as "The Family" celebrates Mama's birthday.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Betty White

Video.summary: Who loves ya, Carol? Guest star Telly Savalas, that's who!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Telly Savalas, Smothers Brothers

Video.summary: Paul Sand plays a shy man trying to gain confidence by listening to a self-help record.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Paul Sand

Video.summary: Jim Nabors is like Caine in "Kung Fu" in a spoof of the David Carradine TV series, here entitled "Yung Fool."
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence stars in a take-off on film "Double Indemnity"..here named "Double Calamity", with Carol too.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Sketches include Harvey and Tim as dueling pianists, and a love triangle between Harvey, Cher...and Carol.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Cher

Video.summary: Jack Klugman sings with Carol, while Tony takes part in a sketch as part of a tribute to Broadway.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jack Klugman, Tony Randall

Video.summary: Tim Conway and Steve Lawrence guest star!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Soupy Sales and Carol play a pair of shoppers browsing samples of sexy cologne.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara McNair, Soupy Sales

Video.summary: The cast of "The Carol Burnett Show" revisits some of their favorite moments from the show.
Video.title: The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers

Image.alt: The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers
The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers

Video.summary: Carol & Sis come home from a costume party. Meanwhile, Carol and Harvey delight with a pair of sketches.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters and Cass Elliot guest star in the latest "As The Stomach Turns".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence is your MC for a roast of Nora Desmond. In "Carol & Sis", Vicki helps sober up a tipsy Carol.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Highlights Dick Van Dyke as a TV announcer who fills in when technical difficulties scuttle the movie.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Anthony Newley & Bernadette Peters guest. Featuring The Invisible Man's mother and a man who can get anything.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Anthony Newley

Video.summary: Guests James Garner, George Carlin, and Ken Berry join the gang for an evening of can't-miss comedy.
Video.title: James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry

Image.alt: James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Guest stars Steve Lawrence & Sally Struthers join in "Late, Late Movie" spoofs. Also: "The Boring Twenties."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Sally Struthers

Video.summary: Hal Linden takes a leave from the 12th Precinct to cut it up with Carol & company!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Hal Linden

Video.summary: Guest star Joanne Woodward spends an evening with "The Family" in this episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Joanne Woodward

Video.summary: Alan King & Lena Zavaroni join Carol for sketches set on Hollywood Boulevard, a baseball game, and a bus stop.
Video.title: Alan King, Lena Zavaroni

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray & Joan Rivers guest! Featuring Rivers' comedy, a "V.I.P." interview, and a talk show segment.
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Joan Rivers

Video.summary: Guests Ronnie Schell and Vicki Carr take to the stage with stand-up and song (respectively)!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ronnie Schell, Vikki Carr

Video.summary: Vicki plays an author whose changes to her story are acted out, and Tim demonstrates the latest in safety.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Neil Sedaka joins in parodies, Harvey learns not to flirt at the I.R.S. office, & Carol gets guests to leave.
Video.title: Neil Sedaka

Video.summary: Mickey Rooney and John Davidson guest. Davidson sings, Rooney stars in a Western, and Carol must choose.
Video.title: Mickey Rooney, John Davidson

Video.summary: Guest Soupy Sales and Carol are shoppers. "The Old Folks" get a visit & Carol quits smoking in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Soupy Sales

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Nanette Fabray star. Featuring Carol as a dowdy secretary, and the spoof "Flight 13 To Nowhere."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Shirley Jones star. Carol is under a spell and Shirley joins "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Shirley Jones, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Rita Moreno guest stars, appearing in a sketch as a nurse. Also featured: Tim as a hapless officer.
Video.title: Rita Moreno

Video.summary: Guests Ken Berry and Totie Fields drop by to take part in "Carol & Sis" and "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Ken Berry, Totie Fields

Video.summary: The conclusion of the fifth-season "Family Show" finale brings to a close the spoof "The Doily Sisters."
Video.title: Family Show
